messages.content: holy shit it's actually happening... just got the final master back from Juno and Undertow sounds incredible now. all 6 tracks are done done done
That's amazing! So the rework on Undertow fixed the low end issues? How does it feel to have the full EP mastered?

yeah the rework was perfect - Juno really knows their stuff. the low end sits so much better in the mix now, doesn't compete with the sub bass from the field recordings. and we locked in April 5th as the official release date which gives me time to finish the album art
April 5th sounds like a good timeline. How's the visual side coming along for the release?

the cover art is like 80% there - doing it all myself which feels right for this project. trying to capture that same tidal feeling as the music, lots of fluid gradients and texture work. plus my patreon folks have been loving the process videos so that's helping fund everything
It's great that you can self-fund through Patreon. Any other plans for the release beyond the art?

oh and get this - Phosphene got picked up for a Spotify editorial playlist last month which is insane. never thought my weird ambient stuff would land on something like that. thinking about doing a small listening party here in Portland too, maybe at one of the venues downtown
A Spotify playlist feature is huge! That should really help with discovery when the full EP drops. What kind of venue are you thinking for the listening party?

probably something intimate, like 50-80 people max. want it to feel like you're sitting in someone's living room experiencing the whole journey from track 1 to 6. after all the commission chaos and creative blocks from winter, having this project finally come together feels like... i don't know, like breathing again

That sounds like the perfect way to debut Tidal. An intimate listening experience really fits the ambient nature of the music. It must feel incredible to have made it through all those challenges to reach this point.

summary: Sam celebrates completing all 6 tracks for their EP Tidal, with Juno Audio successfully mastering the reworked Undertow track. The release date is confirmed for April 5, 2026, and Phosphene was featured on a Spotify editorial playlist.
